overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through Night City. The player character moves through a neon-lit cyberpunk environment featuring convenience stores, holographic billboards, food stalls, and futuristic architecture with heavy Japanese and corporate branding.

events.description: turns right to proceed along the street away from the convenience store

agents.ego_description: walking past the brightly lit 25h/7 convenience store with cyan neon signage

entered.detail: futuristic convenience store with bright cyan neon signage and Japanese text
overhead railway or highway structure with metal beams and lights
tall building with large digital advertisements and graffiti on lower levels

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under an elevated metro structure in a covered walkway. The 25h/7 convenience store with its distinctive cyan neon lighting dominates the left side. The player walks forward past the store, then turns right to proceed along the street. The environment features typical cyberpunk architecture with mixed commercial buildings and overhead infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with food vendors and industrial architecture

events.description: passing the burrito food stall with bright red and yellow signage

agents.ego_description: proceeding along the sidewalk past food vendors and industrial buildings

entered.detail: food vendor stall with red 'BURRITO' signage and menu displays
large diagonal red structural support beam attached to building
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Moving along an urban sidewalk bordered by industrial buildings with large billboards. A prominent red structural beam angles across the building facade on the left. The player passes a burrito food stand and other vendor stalls. Palm trees line the right side of the walkway, and the area transitions from neon-lit to more mixed lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with commercial building entrance

events.description: exits narrow street and enters the open plaza with large trees
turns left to approach the street crossing

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza toward the commercial building entrance then turning to cross the street

notable_agents.action: dark colored car driving through the intersection ahead

entered.detail: large mature trees in planters situated in the open plaza
modern building entrance with large glass doors and overhead digital displays
large glowing digital advertisements on building facades

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a spacious pedestrian plaza with large trees and paved walkways. A modern commercial building with extensive digital signage and holographic advertisements dominates the far side. The player moves through the plaza, passing other pedestrians, then turns left to approach a street intersection where vehicles are passing by.

scene_state.functional_zone: street under elevated highway with massive digital billboards

events.description: crossing the multi-lane street at the crosswalk
passing directly under the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and continuing along the sidewalk beneath the overpass

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the street under the overpass

entered.detail: massive digital billboard displaying three stylized faces with 'KIROSHI' text
elevated highway or metro structure creating a covered tunnel effect
orange and white striped safety barriers along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The player crosses a multi-lane street and enters a section of road covered by an elevated overpass. Dominating the view is a massive Kiroshi holographic billboard with three stylized faces. The area is characterized by heavy neon lighting from advertisements, moving traffic, and the concrete infrastructure of the overpass creating an urban canyon effect.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched urban corridor that evolves from a cramped covered walkway into a sprawling, high-tech commercial plaza. It begins beneath an elevated metro structure, passing the cyan glow of a 25h/7 convenience store before turning right to follow a street lined with industrial buildings and a prominent red structural beam. As the camera moves past a burrito stand and palm trees, the narrow sidewalk opens into a spacious pedestrian plaza filled with large trees and towering holographic advertisements. The scene then shifts toward a busy street intersection, crossing multi-lane traffic to enter the shadow of a concrete overpass. Finally, the view is dominated by a massive Kiroshi holographic billboard featuring three stylized faces, completing the transition into a dense urban canyon of light and steel.
